items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **sub-issue** of #53864 (Azure Mgmt Generator migration), tracking the TypeSpec-based MPG migration for the `Azure.ResourceManager.AlertsManagement` package.

**Current state**: The package currently uses AutoRest/Swagger-based code generation (`autorest.md` present, no `tsp-location.yaml`). It is at GA version `1.1.1`, with `1.2.0-beta.1` started but unreleased.

<details>
<summary>📦 Package Details</summary>

- **SDK path**: `sdk/alertsmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.AlertsManagement/`
- **Current GA version**: `1.1.1`
- **In-progress version**: `1.2.0-beta.1`
- **Code gen**: AutoRest from [`azure-rest-api-specs/specification/alertsmanagement/resource-manager/readme.md`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/0077b4a8c5071d3ab33fd9f9ba013581c9a66b8f/specification/alertsmanagement/resource-manager/readme.md)
- **Namespace**: `Azure.ResourceManager.AlertsManagement`

</details>

<details>
<summary>🗂️ Migration Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Verify TypeSpec spec exists in `azure-rest-api-specs` for `alertsmanagement` resource manager (check `specification/alertsmanagement/AlertsManagement.Management/`)
- [ ] Add `tsp-location.yaml` pointing to the TypeSpec spec
- [ ] Run MPG migration (`mpg-sdk-migration` skill or `eng/scripts/automation/GenerateAndBuildLib.ps1`)
- [ ] Review generated output vs existing hand-authored renames in `autorest.md` (several rename-mapping entries exist that may need to be reflected via `client.tsp` customizations)
- [ ] Address any breaking changes vs `1.1.1` GA using mitigate-breaking-changes patterns (CodeGenSuppress, CodeGenType, hierarchyBuilding, etc.)
- [ ] Run pre-commit checks: `Export-API.ps1`, `dotnet format`, snippets
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Submit PR for review

</details>

<details>
<summary>⚠️ Known Considerations</summary>

**Rename mappings to preserve** (currently in `autorest.md`):
- `AlertModification.modifiedAt` → `modifiedOn` (date-time)
- `AlertProcessingRuleProperties.enabled` → `IsEnabled`
- `AlertsSortByFields.startDateTime` → `StartOn`, `lastModifiedDateTime` → `LastModifiedOn`
- `AlertsSummaryGroup.groupedby` → `GroupedBy`
- `Essentials.startDateTime` → `StartOn`, `lastModifiedUserName` → `lastModifiedBy`

These need to be re-expressed via `@`@clientName`` or `@`@alternateType`` in `client.tsp`, or suppressed/customized on the SDK side.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔗 Helpful Resources</summary>

- [mpg-sdk-migration skill](.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/) — step-by-step migration skill
- [mitigate-breaking-changes skill](.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/) — patterns for breaking change mitigation
- [Parent tracking issue #53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864)
- [Completed migrations tracking #55080](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/55080)
- [local-sdk-workflow instructions](eng/common/instructions/azsdk-tools/local-sdk-workflow.instructions.md)

</details>
